Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to analyze a DECLARE model of a loan application process discussing how activities and constraints shape real life scenarios ensure compliance maintain quality and structure the sequence of events

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Let me map the activities A Receive Application B Preliminary Credit Check C Gather Additional Documents D Assemble Loan Offer Package E Quality Assurance Review F Authorize Contract Terms G Transfer Funds H Notify Customer Z Proceed Without Compliance

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: existence A and existence C Receive Application and Gather Additional Documents must occur at least once in every process instance absence Z Proceed Without Compliance can never happen exactly one B Preliminary Credit Check happens exactly once init A Receive Application must be the first activity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If Assemble Loan Offer Package occurs then Quality Assurance Review must also occur Gather Additional Documents and Authorize Contract Terms must both occur or neither occurs If Receive Application occurs then Preliminary Credit Check must eventually follow Quality Assurance Review must precede Authorize Contract Terms Preliminary Credit Check must be followed by Gather Additional Documents and Gather must be preceded by Credit Check

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Actually let me reconsider the DECLARE semantics

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: response means if A occurs B must eventually occur afterwards precedence means B can only occur if A has occurred before it succession means both response and precedence altresponse means if A occurs B must eventually occur afterwards and between A and B A cannot occur again altprecedence means B can only occur if A has occurred before and between the last A and B no other B can occur altsuccession means both altresponse and altprecedence chainresponse means if A occurs B must immediately follow chainprecedence means B can only occur if A immediately precedes it chainsuccession means both chainresponse and chainprecedence noncoexistence means A and B cannot both occur in the same trace nonsuccession means A cannot be followed by B at any distance nonchainsuccession means A cannot be immediately followed by B

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After Transfer Funds Notify Customer must eventually occur and no other Transfer Funds can happen between a Transfer Funds and its corresponding Notify Customer

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Actually altprecedence means each occurrence of G must be preceded by H and no other G can occur between that H and G

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: the combination of altresponse and altprecedence essentially means H and G must alternate

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: since we have existence constraints and chain constraints in practice each activity probably occurs once making the alternation constraint more about ensuring the correct ordering

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: chainsuccession means Quality Assurance Review must be immediately followed by Assemble Loan Offer Package and Assemble Loan Offer Package must be immediately preceded by Quality Assurance Review and chainresponse means Assemble Loan Offer Package must be immediately followed by Transfer Funds so we get E D G as consecutive events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
